title: EXPOSE Run Manifest
description: Manifest accompanying each canonical artifact. Describes run provenance, signing metadata, and integrity hashes. Smaller than the canonical artifact and intended for quick inspection without parsing the full artifact.

pipeline_version.description: Git commit hash of the EXPOSE codebase that produced this run.

canonical_artifact_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of canonical.json.gz. Tampering with the canonical file invalidates this hash.

target_count.description: Number of targets in the canonical artifact.

llm_provider_used.description: LLM provider and model details for any enrichment performed during this run.

collectors_enabled.description: Identifiers of collectors enabled for this run.

feature_flags.description: Feature flags in effect during this run.

signed_by.description: Identity that signed this artifact. For cosign-keyless via GitHub Actions OIDC, this is the workload identity. For unsigned (lab-only), this field describes the operator and is informational.

signature_filename.description: Filename of the detached signature accompanying this manifest.

transparency_log_entry.description: Reference to the Sigstore transparency log entry (Rekor UUID or URL). Null for unsigned or non-transparency-log signing modes.
